Manifest transformation and generation tools used by development and CI workflows.
audit-prototype-candidates.cjs: Read-only ADR-050 prototype candidate audit CLI for local, PR, weekly, LLM-semantic and platform promotion backlog workflows.
compile-authoring-manifests.cjs: Compiler for ADR-030 authoring manifests that generates runtime manifests and source map companion files.
compile-cache.cjs: Level-3 compile cache (ADR-057) and hit/miss telemetry: content-hash-keyed, atomic, one-shot .tmp storage that is never a source of truth.
compile-worker.cjs: Worker-thread entry point that compiles one authoring job as a pure function so the compile pool stays byte-identical to a sequential run.
